textByHashes.4e11e17dc1846842d15256cf54b256e74ce177f8: My apologies, but I can't take you with me while you're affected by that spell. It should wear off in minutes, seconds.
textByHashes.eeeb6beb7ae9cdec11591385d074963ccad517ed: Hey! I'm not flying out this deep into the Wilderness. They don't pay me danger money, you know. I'm out of here.
